topStories.title: Vijay follows footsteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
topStories.description: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

topStories.title: NDA, Opposition spar in LS over efforts to free country of Maoism
topStories.description: While Shiv Sena pointed out that the red corridor has shrunk significantly due to the policies of the NDA govt and the previous UPA regime was helpless, the Congress hit back saying it was the UPA that launched Operation Green Hunt and had created the Commando Battalion for Resolute Action (CoBRA) to deal with Maoist threat; Union Home Minister Amit Shah had announced that Maoist menace would be completely eliminated by March 31, 2026

topStories.title: Suvendu Adhikari files nomination from Nandigram, says BJP will register decisive victory in Bengal

topStories.title: Schools, water, industry: What civilian targets have US, Israel, Iran hit?
topStories.description: US and Israel have increasingly been hitting civilian sites in Iran as efforts to end the weeks-long war are under way.

topStories.title: Russian tanker reaches Cuba months after Donald Trump cut fuel supplies; has US stance changed?
topStories.description: Cuba faces severe power blackouts, affecting hospitals, as the US oil blockade hampers energy supplies. A Russian tanker delivered crude oil, seen as vital for the nation amid the crisis. Trump's softened stance may ease restrictions, but Cuba's energy challenges remain significant.

dailyNews.title: Pirates broadcasters slam Oneil Cruz's defensive effort vs Mets
dailyNews.description: Pittsburgh Pirates outfielder Oneil Cruz faced criticism from broadcasters on Sunday as he glided to a fly ball against the New York Mets on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Gavin Newsom bashes Elon Musk as ‘one of the great disappointments'
dailyNews.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom told Axios that Elon Musk has “put the brakes" on EV innovation and warned China is overtaking the United States in the electric vehicle market.

dailyNews.title: Mark Cuban credits his 'disgusting' sandwich for helping him boost protein and beat aging
dailyNews.description: Entrepreneur Mark Cuban admits his go-to lunch of canned baby clams, egg white wraps, and honey is "disgusting" but says it fuels his protein and longevity goals.

dailyNews.title: Gavin Rossdale says co-parenting with Gwen Stefani is like a ‘two-lane highway' that never merges
dailyNews.description: Gavin Rossdale says co-parenting with Gwen Stefani is like a two-lane highway that never merges, but insists the system works for their kids.

dailyNews.title: Charles Barkley tees off on alleged treatment of 'amazing immigrants'
dailyNews.description: NBA legend Charles Barkley went on a rant on Sunday about how "amazing immigrants" are treated in the U.S. without citing examples of such treatment.

dailyNews.title: Twins manager ejected after exploding over timing of ABS challenge vs Orioles
dailyNews.description: Minnesota Twins manager Derek Shelton was furious with the umpires over the timing of Baltimore Orioles pitcher Ryan Helsley's challenge to a call.

dailyNews.title: LSU infielder tosses bat sky-high after clutch home run in comeback win
dailyNews.description: LSU Tigers infielder Seth Dardar hit a clutch home run in the bottom of the sixth inning to help the team regain the lead and eventually win against Kentucky.

dailyNews.title: Iran vows enemies won't escape without a 'lesson' amid warning of ‘major world war’ and more top headlines

topStories.title: Trump Claims ‘Regime Change’ in Iran Is Already Complete
topStories.description: President Trump suggested that Iran’s current leaders were “much more reasonable” as he sought to show progress in his war aims. Despite a month of U.S.-Israeli attacks, Iran’s government, led by clerics and the Revolutionary Guards, appears firmly in control.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Order at Supreme Court Splits Conservative Scholars
dailyNews.description: Before President Trump’s order to limit birthright citizenship, there was widespread agreement that the 14th Amendment guaranteed citizenship for U.S.-born babies.

dailyNews.title: They’ve Been Accused of Running a ‘Covert’ Operation in Greenland. It’s No Secret.
dailyNews.description: Members of President Trump’s circle, working in plain sight, have caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services for trying to make friends and cut deals on the Danish territory.

dailyNews.title: President Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to reporters on Air Force One and claimed that "regime change" has happened in Iran since the conflict began and that it was imperative.

dailyNews.title: More Troops Arrive in Middle East as Trump Hails Iran Negotiations
dailyNews.description: As thousands more American troops arrive in the Middle East to join a widening war, President Donald Trump says Iran is softening its weekslong blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, after it allowed 20 boats through the oil route. It comes as the Washington Post reports that the Pentagon is preparing for weeks of ground operations in Iran, short of a full-scale invasion. NBC’s Matt Bradley reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: TSA Pay to Resume As Airport Security Bottleneck Persists
dailyNews.description: Travelers across the country are still dealing with delays at airport security days after President Donald Trump signed an executive order approving TSA officers’ back pay. The Department of Homeland Security says the officers could start getting paychecks as soon as Monday or Tuesday. NBC’s Priscilla Thompson reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Democrats push Trump admin to tackle insider trading in booming prediction markets
dailyNews.description: The letter to the CFTC and Office of Government Ethics (OGE) comes after weeks of increasing scrutiny on potential insider trading by government employees.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”

dailyNews.title: What to know about the legal fight over Trump's birthright citizenship order
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will hear arguments Wednesday over the legality of President Trump's executive order that seeks to end birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices soar as Trump threatens to invade Iran, seize its resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs sending U.S. forces into Iran for ground operation
dailyNews.description: With Marines and the Army's 82nd Airborne Division amassing in the Middle East, President Trump on Air Force One wouldn't confirm if U.S. forces will head into Iran for a ground operation, only saying, "I just have lots of alternatives." It comes as members of both parties have voiced concerns. Weijia Jiang has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Travel issues continue at airports as House rejects Senate deal that could end partial shutdown
dailyNews.description: Travelers over the weekend experienced more long lines at Transportation Security Administration checkpoints after House Republicans rejected a deal passed by the Senate that could have ended the partial government shutdown. TSA workers may still soon get paid though, due to an executive order from President Trump. Jason Allen reports.
